texto: Did you know we carry perfume around?It’s a special fragrance that cannot be bought at any store.It is more precious than any fragrance ever.We carry the fragrance of Christ wherever we go.The Holy Spirit has it’s own distinct scent.We are God’s Special Bottle of Perfume.And both believers and unbelievers can ‘smell’ it!
autor: Diana Rasmussen of Prayers and Promises
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Diana Rasmussen of Prayers and Promises que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Did you know we carry perfume around?It’s a special fragrance that cannot be bought at any store.…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, believer, fragrance, com foco em fragrance e god.
